::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(mlr3)
library(tidyverse)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr}
```
‚îÄ‚îÄ Attaching packages ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ tidyverse 1.3.2 ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚úî ggplot2 3.3.6      ‚úî purrr   0.3.4 
‚úî tibble  3.1.8      ‚úî dplyr   1.0.10
‚úî tidyr   1.2.1      ‚úî stringr 1.4.1 
‚úî readr   2.1.2      ‚úî forcats 0.5.2 
‚îÄ‚îÄ Conflicts ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ tidyverse_conflicts() ‚îÄ‚îÄ
‚úñ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
‚úñ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
```
:::

```{.r .cell-code}
library(mlr3learners)       # load recommended learners provided by mlr3learners package  # this loads further less-well-supported learners
library(mlr3cluster)
library(mlr3extralearners)
data = read_csv("mushrooms.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
colnames(data) = make.names(colnames(data), unique = T)
data %>%
  mutate_all(as_factor) -> data
```
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
task = as_task_classif(data, target = "class", id="mushromm_task")
learner = lrn("classif.rpart", id="mushromm_learner")
learner$param_set
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}
```
<ParamSet>
                id    class lower upper nlevels
            <char>   <char> <num> <num>   <num>
 1:             cp ParamDbl     0     1     Inf
 2:     keep_model ParamLgl    NA    NA       2
 3:     maxcompete ParamInt     0   Inf     Inf
 4:       maxdepth ParamInt     1    30      30
 5:   maxsurrogate ParamInt     0   Inf     Inf
 6:      minbucket ParamInt     1   Inf     Inf
 7:       minsplit ParamInt     1   Inf     Inf
 8: surrogatestyle ParamInt     0     1       2
 9:   usesurrogate ParamInt     0     2       3
10:           xval ParamInt     0   Inf     Inf
                                                                                      default
                                                                                       <list>
 1:                                                                                      0.01
 2:                                                                                     FALSE

10:      0
```
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
resampling = rsmp("cv", folds = 10)
resampling$instantiate(task)
rr = resample(task, learner, resampling, store_models = TRUE)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```{.r .cell-code}
rr$aggregate(msr("classif.acc"))
```
